user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: The user wants to remove the gray overlay and "PAUSED" text when the game is paused, but keep the HUD and game visuals visible. Currently, `renderPausedOverlay(p)` is called in the PAUSED state, which adds the gray overlay and pause text.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Remove the `renderPausedOverlay(p)` call from the PAUSED case in the game loop's state machine, so the game appears normal when paused (just frozen in time) with the HUD still visible.
